title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. subvandasii
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. subvandasii is a rare and lesser-known species of the Hieracium plant, commonly referred to as Hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. subvandasii include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it potentially beneficial for the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, improve blood circulation, and boost the immune system. Hieracium schmidtii subsp. subvandasii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a tincture or salve, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
